tasks.label: probe-odoo-boms
tasks.command:
cd /Users/jasoncrain/Documents/tuffjug-production-planner && . .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from app.integrations.odoo import OdooClient
client = OdooClient()
connected = client.connect()
print('connected=' + str(connected))
if connected:
    boms = client.get_boms()
    print('bom_count=' + str(len(boms)))
    for bom in boms[:10]:
        print(bom.to_dict())
PY

tasks.label: probe-odoo-bom-shapes
tasks.command:
cd /Users/jasoncrain/Documents/tuffjug-production-planner && . .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from app.integrations.odoo import OdooClient
import json
client = OdooClient()
print('connect', client.connect())
records = client._execute('mrp.bom', domain=[['active','=',True]], fields=['id','display_name','code','active','type','product_tmpl_id','product_id','product_qty','uom_id','bom_line_ids','operation_ids','ready_to_produce','produce_delay','days_to_prepare_mo','enable_batch_size','batch_size','company_id'])
print('bom_count', len(records))
for record in records[:3]:
    print(json.dumps(record, indent=2, default=str))
    print('---')
line_fields = client.models.execute_kw(client.config.odoo_database, client.uid, client.config.odoo_api_key, 'mrp.bom.line', 'fields_get', [[]], {'attributes':['string','type','required','readonly']})
print('bom_line_fields_sample', {k: line_fields[k] for k in list(line_fields)[:20]})
PY

tasks.label: probe-bom-model-shape
tasks.command:
cd /Users/jasoncrain/Documents/tuffjug-production-planner && . .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from app.integrations.odoo import OdooClient
from app.models.odoo import BomModel
client = OdooClient()
client.connect()
records = client._execute('mrp.bom', domain=[['active','=',True]], fields=['id','display_name','code','active','type','product_tmpl_id','product_id','product_qty','uom_id','bom_line_ids','operation_ids','ready_to_produce','produce_delay','days_to_prepare_mo','enable_batch_size','batch_size','company_id'])
models = [BomModel.from_odoo_record(r) for r in records[:3]]
for model in models:
    print(model.model_dump())
    print('---')
PY

tasks.label: probe-live-boms
tasks.command:
cd /Users/jasoncrain/Documents/tuffjug-production-planner && . .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from app.integrations.odoo import OdooClient
from app.models.odoo import BomModel, BomComponentModel
client = OdooClient()
client.connect()
boms = client.get_boms()
components = client.get_bom_components()
print('bom_count', len(boms))
for bom in boms[:5]:
    print(bom.model_dump())
print('bom_line_count', len(components))
PY
